About the studio

A small studio that
actually ships.

We're two designers and one engineer, working out of a home office, obsessing over the details that make the difference between "another local business site" and one that gets you found on Google, called on the phone, and booked out.

Two years ago our founder Michael tried to book an emergency plumber at 2 a.m. Water was coming through the kitchen ceiling. Every local site he found was either broken, had no clear pricing, or made him fill out a five-step form to get a "quote." The next morning, WebStudios was born.

"A website should work like a good tradesperson: show up on time, do what it says it will, and never leave you wondering what it costs."
01

Three clients a month, max.

Every project gets the founder's direct attention. No account managers, no offshore handoffs.

02

You pay nothing until launch.

We carry the design and build risk. If you're not proud to send customers to your site, you owe us nothing.

03

One flat price, everything in.

$97/month covers hosting, edits, domain, uptime, backups, unlimited changes. No add-ons.

04

We write the copy too.

Headlines, service descriptions, FAQs, guarantee language — no "fill in your copy here" templates.

Services

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

01 — Design

Custom-designed, not templated.

Every site designed from a blank canvas for your trade, your city, and the specific things that make your business worth choosing.

  • Custom layout and typography
  • Mobile-first responsive design
  • Accessibility (WCAG AA) baked in
02 — Copywriting

We write the words.

Headlines, service descriptions, guarantees, FAQs — all written from a strategy call, not from a template.

  • Trade-specific messaging
  • Objection-handling FAQ section
  • Local SEO keyword targeting
03 — Hosting

Fast. Watched. Never down.

Sub-second load times globally, SSL, and 99.99% uptime. If it goes down, we know before you do.

  • Edge CDN in 200+ cities
  • Daily automated backups
  • Uptime monitoring 24/7
04 — Lead forms

Every submission, on your phone.

Contact form built to actually get filled out. New leads notify your phone with full context — no login, no dashboard.

  • Direct SMS and email notifications
  • Call tracking and reporting
  • Built-in AI spam filtering
05 — SEO

Ranking in your city.

Local pack SEO — the map results at the top of Google. Optimized for the 4-6 keywords that book you jobs.

  • Google Business Profile setup
  • Structured data and schema.org
  • Local pack ranking strategy
06 — Edits

Unlimited small changes.

New service? New photo? Price change? Text us. Usually the same day, always within 48 hours.

  • Text and photo swaps
  • New service pages
  • Seasonal promotions
How it works

Three steps from zero to live.

01

Design & Build

30-minute kickoff call. We learn your trade, your services, your pricing. Then we design, write, and build the entire site in a week.

02

Host & Maintain

Once you approve, we launch on your domain and take over hosting, uptime, backups, and any edits — no tickets, no waiting.

03

Convert & Grow

Once you're live, we optimize the site every month — new content, better SEO, tuned lead forms — until you're at capacity.

Words from clients

Owners who used to dread Mondays.

FAQ

Answers to the real questions.

You owe us nothing. Zero. We carry 100% of the design and build risk. If we don't ship a site you're proud to send customers to, we don't bill you. This isn't a marketing line — it's how we're structured.

Yes. Day 1: kickoff call. Days 2-4: design and copy. Day 5: revisions. Day 6: final review. Day 7: launch. This only works because we specialize in local service businesses — we know the format cold.

The custom-built site, your domain (purchased and configured), hosting, SSL, daily backups, uptime monitoring, unlimited small edits, and lead notifications to your phone. No hidden fees.

You own the domain and all your content. The site itself runs on our stack. If you ever leave, we hand over an export you can host anywhere.

Yes. Every project includes Google Business Profile setup, and we build structured data into the site so you show up in the local pack. We can also set up a review request flow that texts your customers after a job.

Plumbers, electricians, HVAC, cleaning companies, landscapers, movers, barbershops, roofers, and general contractors. If you're a local service business and your customers Google you before they call, we can help.
